title: Age of Phantoms
overview: Clumsy Haruhiko and violent Mai need more people on their Phantom-fighting team. They meet a Phantom Eater, Reina.

title: Take Out the Annoying UFO!
overview: The team sets out to deal with security robots turned Phantom. But it turns out that Minase Koito was already there, fighting the haywire robots with her beautiful voice.

title: Operation Copy-Paste Memories
overview: A pair of Phantoms terrify people as they try to cross a bridge. The team goes to investigate, and Mai begins to remember something odd about the place.

title: Fake Family
overview: After a huge victory feast with the team, Reina vanishes on a mysterious bus, hypnotized.

title: I Can't Use My Special Abilities
overview: A vicious Phantom attacks the rabbit hutch at school. Koito is tasked with hunting it down, but she hurts her throat, shutting down her abilities.

title: Kurumi and the Teddy Bear Kingdom
overview: Kumamakura Kurumi sucks Haruhiko and the gang into a fantasy world inside her own mind, filled with talking bears and giant mushrooms.

title: Schrödinger's Cat Mansion
overview: The team investigates the spontaneous cat-ification of the school's students.

title: Break Through the Monkey Hot Spring!
overview: Hosea Academy is invaded by a band of pervy hot spring monkeys.

title: The Strange Tale of the Bakumatsu Phantom
overview: The team gets recruited to perform in a play about a Phantom in medieval Japan. As they're rehearsing, Koito notices the presence of a real Phantom nearby.

title: Little Ruru's Big Dream
overview: A witch Phantom grants Ruru's wish to become human. She gets her wish, but...

title: Tiny Haruhiko-kun
overview: Haruhiko returns to his childhood -- literally -- and he doesn't remember ever being any older.

title: The Mother Hath Returned
overview: Reports abound of a Phantom attacking students and taking their special abilities. Meanwhile, Haruhiko is reunited with his mother.

title: The Eternal Phantom World
overview: Enigma storms the Alayashiki research facility.
